key.name: server-host
key.description: Hostname or IP of the Whisper NPU server

key.name: server-port
key.description: Port number of the Whisper NPU server

key.name: device
key.description: OpenVINO inference device: NPU, CPU, or GPU

key.name: hotkey
key.description: evdev key name used for push-to-talk activation

key.name: stream-interval
key.description: Seconds between streaming transcription updates in toggle mode

key.name: hf-org
key.description: HuggingFace organization to search for whisper models

key.name: language-buddy-enabled
key.description: When enabled, transcribed text is rewritten in multiple tones and presented in a floating overlay for selection

key.name: language-buddy-bypass
key.description: When enabled, the original text is typed immediately and the overlay appears for reference only. Clicking a card will replace the already-typed text.

key.name: language-buddy-timeout
key.description: Seconds before the Language Buddy overlay auto-dismisses (0 to disable)

key.name: language
key.description: ISO language code for multilingual models (empty for auto-detect)

key.name: voice-commands-enabled
key.description: Detect trigger phrases like "select all" or "new line" and execute them as keystrokes

key.name: vad-threshold
key.description: Voice activity detection silence threshold in dB (lower = more sensitive)

key.name: recall-key
key.description: evdev key name to show transcription history picker

key.name: auto-punctuate
key.description: Post-process transcriptions through the LLM to add punctuation and capitalization

key.name: translate-to
key.description: Target language for LLM-powered translation of transcriptions (empty to disable)

key.name: audio-feedback-enabled
key.description: Play sounds on recording start, stop, and transcription complete

key.name: dictation-formatting-enabled
key.description: Auto-format numbers, abbreviations, emails, and URLs in transcriptions
